calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-13-2021 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, been assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Garry Jao.
Dept: 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 11:03 a.m.

Kevin B. Buiza, Esq. appeared for plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A.
Mr. Buiza appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Garry Joa.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Common Counts was filed on October 19, 2020.
Defendant Garry Jao's answer to plaintiff's complaint was filed on January 11, 2021.
Order Deeming Requests for Admissions Admitted was filed April 30, 2021.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was served on May 27, 2021, setting trial for October 12, 2021. Matter was assiged to Department 514 for a Short Cause Trial/Prove-Up Hearing on October 18, 2021, and continued to today, December 13, 2021.
Plaintiff's Trial Brief was filed October 5, 2021.
CCP Section 98 Declaration in Lieu of Personal Testimony was served on October 27, 2021, and filed with the Clerk's Office on November 1, 2021.
No DOE defendants named in plaintiff's complaint.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A., and against defendant Garry Jao, as follows:

Principal/Damages - $20,229.29.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - Waived.
Total - $20,229.29.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Proceedings concluded at 11:07 a.m.

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-15-2021 Continued To Dec-13-21 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 514

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-12-2021 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-27-2021 Set For Trial On Oct-12-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Motion For Order Deeming Request For Admission Admitted
Off Calendar Apr-26-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s Motion For Order Deeming Request For Admission Admitted:
No opposition was received and good cause appearing, the motion is granted.

Prevailing/Moving party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling via email to sigrid.irias@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Sigird Irias, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
